nasb.text: in order to lay hold of the hearts of the house of Israel who are estranged from Me through all their idols.” ’

esv.text: that I may lay hold of the hearts of the house of Israel, who are all estranged from me through their idols.

cnv.text: 好奪回以色列家的心。他們眾人因自己的偶像，與我疏遠。’

ccb.text: 好夺回以色列人的心，他们因为拜偶像而远离我。’
